name: Pheromosa - Capturing the Size-Queen Pokemon
description:
"Ugh, if you're another shrimpdick trainer who can't even bulge out my stomach, don't even talk to me."

A Pheromosa was sighted in the Alola region, and you - a very audacious trainer - want to capture it. However, as an exotic Ultra Beast from another dimension, they resist traditional means of capture. No, if you wish to capture a Pheromosa, you have to undergo a mating ritual with her! Impress her, and she might join your party - but be warned, it won't be easy. What she's looking for is only the biggest and thickest, something that'll destroy her womb, bulge out her stomach, and knock her up with at least a triple digit amount of eggs, and don't think she'll be satisfied with just one ejaculation, she'll keep going for hours until you're milked dry or you somehow manage to satisfy her. Do you think you can tame this demanding Pokemon?

Art by: Tasteofchoklit
